emails.subject: Legal Script
emails.body: Per our discussion, attached is my rough draft of the Legal Script. Just to save you the time and effort of having people read for the part, may I suggest Julia Roberts to play my role in the film. She's already got this paralegal thing down with the Erin Brokovitch role...

emails.subject: Re: Legal Script
emails.body: Re: Legal Script Julia Roberts will be in next week reading for your role. I will set up a time for you both to meet in La La Land on the deck on the 51st floor. Thanks for the script, Dan
